info.title: Ecommerce-buildTime
info.description: API for managing the ecommerce platform, including products, orders, and customer accounts.

tags.name: products
tags.description: Operations related to product catalog management.

tags.name: orders
tags.description: Operations for processing and managing customer orders.

tags.name: customers
tags.description: Operations concerning customer account management and profiles.

get.summary: Retrieve the current shopping cart for a user
get.description: Fetches the existing shopping cart associated with the specified user ID, returning all items and current quantities. Useful for displaying the cart contents to the user.

200.description: Successful retrieval of the user's cart

example.message: The provided userId is not valid

500.description: Internal server error occurred while retrieving cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add an item to the user's shopping cart
post.description: Adds a specified product along with quantity to the shopping cart for the user identified by userId. Returns the updated cart details after the addition.

requestBody.description: Details of the cart item to add (product ID, quantity, and optional options)

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product to add

quantity.description: Quantity of the product to add

options.description: Additional options or configurations for the product

200.description: Cart updated successfully with the new item

400.description: Invalid cart item or userId provided

example.message: The cart item details are invalid or missing required fields

details.issue: Quantity must be a positive integer

500.description: Internal error while adding item to cart

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Place a new order for the given user
post.description: Creates a new order for the user identified by userId based on their current cart or specified purchase details. Returns order confirmation including order ID and status.

400.description: Invalid order request or userId parameter

example.message: The order request could not be processed due to invalid input

details.issue: User ID does not exist or is malformed

404.description: User not found or order could not be placed

example.message: No user exists with the provided userId

details.issue: User ID does not match any records

500.description: Internal server error while placing the order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Retrieve details of a specific order
get.description: Fetch detailed information about an order using its unique identifier `orderId`. Returns order status, items, pricing, and other relevant data associated with the order. Useful for tracking and managing individual orders.

example.message: The provided orderId is invalid or malformed.
No order found with the given orderId.

details.issue: Order ID does not correspond to any existing order

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Starts a payment process by accepting payment details such as amount, currency, and payment method. Returns a response containing payment confirmation or instructions for further action.

requestBody.description: Payment initiation details including amount, currency, and payment method

400.description: Invalid payment request format or missing required fields

example.message: Payment request is missing required fields or contains invalid data.

details.issue: Card number format invalid or missing

example.message: The payment was declined by the payment provider.

details.issue: Insufficient funds or invalid payment credentials

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Receive and process payment gateway webhook notifications
post.description: Handles asynchronous payment notifications sent from external payment gateways, updating the payment status accordingly. Accepts payment event data to reconcile transaction status in the system.

requestBody.description: Webhook payload from the payment gateway with payment event details

example.message: The webhook payload is malformed or missing required fields.

402.description: Payment webhook indicates payment failure or denial

example.message: The payment associated with the webhook failed or was declined.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.summary: Add a new product to the catalog
post.description: Creates a new product in the product catalog. The request body must contain all necessary product details. Returns the created product with all assigned attributes.

requestBody.description: Product details to add to the catalog

example.name: Wireless Mouse
example.description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with adjustable DPI

400.description: Bad request due to invalid product data

example.message: Provided product data is invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Price must be a positive number

409.description: Conflict due to product already existing

example.message: A product with the given identifier already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

get.summary: Track the shipping status of an order
get.description: Retrieves the current shipping status and tracking details for the specified order using the orderId path parameter. Returns shipment progress and estimated delivery information.

example.message: The order with the specified ID does not exist

details.issue: No order matches the provided identifier

example.message: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

post.description: Creates a new user account with the provided user details. The request body must include necessary fields such as username, password, and contact information. Returns the registered user's profile data.

example.message: Submitted registration details are invalid or incomplete

details.issue: Password does not meet complexity requirements

409.description: User already exists with given credentials

example.message: A user with the given email or username already exists
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.

currency.description: Currency code for the prices (e.g., USD, EUR).

discount.description: Discount applied to this cart item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the item after discount.

price.description: Original price of the product before discount.

quantity.description: Number of units of the product in the cart.

currency.description: Currency code used for the cart prices.

items.description: List of items in the user's cart.

payableAmount.description: Total amount to be paid after discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the cart.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the cart was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user owning the cart.

discount.description: Discount applied to this order item.

finalPrice.description: Final price of the product after discount.

price.description: Original price of the product before discount.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: Amount to be paid for the order after discounts.

paymentStatus.description: Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed).

status.description: Current status of the order (e.g., shipped, delivered).

totalAmount.description: Total cost of the order before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: Total discount applied to the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the order was last updated.

userId.description: Identifier of the user who placed the order.

amount.description: Amount to be paid in the specified currency.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order associated with the payment.

paymentGateway.description: Payment gateway used for processing the payment.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to make the payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal).

amount.description: Amount that was processed in the payment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment was created.

orderId.description: Identifier of the order the payment is for.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier for this payment transaction.

paymentMethod.description: Method used to complete the payment.

status.description: Status of the payment (e.g., success, failed).

transactionId.description: Identifier provided by the payment gateway for the transaction.

gatewayResponse.description: Response message from the payment gateway webhook.

paymentId.description: Unique identifier of the payment related to the webhook.

status.description: Current status of the payment as reported by the webhook.

transactionId.description: Transaction identifier assigned by the payment provider.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase.

category.description: Category to which the product belongs.

currency.description: Currency code for the product price.

description.example: High quality wireless headphones with noise cancellation.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product.

stock.description: Number of items available in stock.

available.description: Indicates if the product is currently available for purchase

category.description: Category to which the product belongs

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date string indicating when the product was created

currency.description: Currency code for price representation, e.g. USD, EUR

description.example: A high-quality electronic device with multiple features.

rating.description: Average customer rating of the product (out of 5)

stock.description: Number of items currently in stock

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date string indicating last update time

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier service partner handling the delivery

estimatedDelivery.description: Estimated delivery date and time in ISO 8601 format

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update in ISO 8601 format

orderId.description: Unique identifier of the order being tracked

status.description: Current delivery status of the order

trackingId.description: Tracking number assigned by the courier

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

userType.description: Type of user, e.g. admin, customer

active.description: Indicates whether the user account is active

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 date string indicating when the user was created

phone.description: User's phone number including country code

preferredCurrency.description: Currency preferred by the user for transactions

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 date string indicating last update time

userType.description: Type of user, e.g. admin, customer

error.description: Short error type describing the client error

message.description: Detailed error message explaining the cause

status.description: HTTP status code related to the client error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

path.description: API endpoint path where the error happened

details.description: List of detailed issues found in the request

field.description: Name of the field with an issue

error.description: Short error type describing the server error

status.description: HTTP status code associated with the server error

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the error occurred in ISO 8601 format

requestId.description: Unique request identifier for tracing server errors
